title: Brazilian Delight
description: A Farmer's Delight addon that adds all kinds of Brazilian goods!
body:
![Brazilian Delight Logo](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1230/351/brazilian_delight_june_festival-png.png) # Dependencies * [DeltaBox Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/deltaboxlib) * [Architectury](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) * If you are using Forge, [Kotlin For Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/kotlin-for-forge) * If you are using Forge, [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) * If you are using Fabric, [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) * If you are using Fabric, [Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) # About the Mod **Brazilian Delight** is an addon for the [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) mod. It adds recipes, crops and features related to the brazilian culture! **Brazil** is a tropical country with a rich and diverse culture, and this mod aims to bring some of that to the game. There are many things to explore and discover! ![Background Brazilian Delight](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/956/982/java_2024-08-30-21-30-51-2x.jpg) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/956/994/vine_divider.png) # Features ![Brazilian Delight](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1230/393/123image-png.png) Currently, the mod adds: * Guaraná * Açaí * Coconut * Lemon * Cassava * Coffee * Yerba Mate * Black Beans * Carioca Beans * Collard Greens * Corn * Garlic   Due to the amount of native brazilian fruits and vegetables, there are many more to come! ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1230/392/7image-png.png) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/956/984/java_2024-08-30-21-38-38-2x.jpg) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1230/380/1image-png.png) The mod adds a LOTS of new foods, with many more coming, such as: * Coxinha * Cheese Bread * Carrot Cake with Chocolate * Brigadeiro * Feijoada * Green Soup * Stroganoff * Tropeiro Beans * Fish Moqueca * Açaí Cream * Cassava Fritters And many more! Oof! ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/956/994/vine_divider.png) # Compatibility Most of the features of this mod are compatible with other mods, the recipes and items uses forge tags to make it easier to add compatibility with other mods. If you find any incompatibility, please report it. ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/956/994/vine_divider.png) # Future The mod is still in development, and there are many things I would like to add! If you would like to give ideas or help with the mod, feel free to contact me! ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/956/994/vine_divider.png) # Credits [DannBrown](https://x.com/deltaboxlabs) - Mod Creator, Main Coder, Some Textures [ArBeet](https://x.com/ArBeeeet) - Main Artist [Shadomal](https://github.com/vitorsantosb) - Some Code and Ideas [TheBlackhole](https://github.com/TheBlackole8911) - Wiki [Unroman](https://github.com/unroman) - Logo Design [Delta](https://modrinth.com/user/OopsOnlyDelta) - Block Models [Nação Sururu](https://www.youtube.com/@Na%C3%A7%C3%A3oSururu) - Music
[Milky](https://x.com/Milk_Furr), [Cebularz](https://www.curseforge.com/members/cebularz_/projects) and [Etherton](https://pro.fiverr.com/freelancers/etherton?source=gig_page) - Item textures
